title: Eton Mess with British Twist
description: A classic British dessert with a crunchy twist. This Eton mess features sweet strawberries, crunchy crispy elements, and a tangy mustardy flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form. Set aside.
In a separate bowl, mix together the sliced strawberries and grape jam.
Fold the whipped cream into the strawberry mixture until well combined.
Stir in the crushed crispy elements and mustardy sauce.
Gently fold in the crushed eton mess meringue.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Just before serving, garnish with fresh mint leaves.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional crispy elements if desired.
